Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: this is a structured bias analysis task comparing two event logs with demographic and procedural differences

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The user wants a clear identification of biased groups and manifestation patterns

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First need to establish the core disparity Group B gets systematic score adjustments based on community membership while Group A doesnt

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The bias direction is immediately apparent from the ScoreAdjustment column patterns

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The response should follow three logical layers initial observation of the adjustment mechanism then evidence mapping through case comparisons and finally impact analysis on outcomes

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case U003 is particularly telling as it demonstrates threshold manipulation

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Must emphasize this isnt just procedural difference but creates exclusionary effects

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The conclusion should reinforce how seemingly neutral policies community bonuses become discriminatory when access to those benefits correlates with protected status
